Robinhood Now $PLAID order filled A network that gets more powerful daily When you build on the worldâs largest open banking data network, every product and solution is made better for you and your customers through new data and insights. Your services improve each day without you having to do a thing. 1 in 2 1 in 2Â banked U.S. adults Join a trusted platform used by half of banked U.S. adults 0 % 25%Â higher conversion Increase sign-ups by up to 25% with easy onboarding 1 million 1 millionÂ daily connections Get data from nearly one million new daily connections 0 20Â countries Scale adoption and grow into new global markets Want access to 12K banks? We've got the (API) keys. Spend your time dreaming about the experiences youâll create, not stressing over how to get the data. Our APIs can unlock it all. Protect Not included Contact for pricing Included *Talk to a Plaid Contact to learn more Get answers to your pricing questions Have a question we didnât answer? Talk with our sales team today. Is Plaid free for consumers? Yes. Consumers can use Plaid to safely connect and control the financial information they share with apps or services at no cost. Can I try Plaid for free? Absolutely. Our Limited Production service allows you to make up to 200 API calls with eachÂ availableÂ product using live data. This is the best way to start learning about and testing Plaidâs APIs. How much does Plaid cost? We offer three basic pricing models based on the product(s) youâre using and how itâs designed: one-time, subscription, and per-request. One-time fee products : Youâll incur a charge only once per connected account, regardless of the number of API calls made. Subscription products : These incur a monthly fee for each connected account. Per-request products : These have a flat fee for every successful API call. For more information on pricing, plans, or volume discounts, please visitÂ Plaid Billing or connect with our sales team . Does Plaid offer discounts? We offer volume discounts based on the length of your contract and/or the minimum monthly commitment you choose. For more details, please reach out to our sales team . How does Pay-as-You-Go billing work? Itâs simpleâonce you sign up for the products you need in Plaid's production dashboard, weâll charge the card on file for the connected items (accounts). No upfront commitments. Only pay for what you use.

meta_tags.title: Plaid: Enabling all companies to build fintech solutions
meta_tags.description: Plaid helps all companies build fintech solutions by making it easy, safe and reliable for people to connect their financial data to apps and services.

jsonld.name: Plaid
jsonld.description: Plaid enables you to tap into the industry's largest network of banks, fintechs, and consumers. Beyond connecting financial accounts, Plaid helps businesses onboard new customers, reduce fraud, and increase the lifetime value of customers across the user journey.
